metric_traceability.metric: zero stale Markdown links to removed social-content sibling skill directories
metric_traceability.verify: rg -n "\]\([^)]*(ai-social-media-content|social-media-carousel|linkedin-content|twitter-thread-creation)" AGENTS.md docs skills tickets agents templates

implementation-plan.notes: Plan names the social-first migration, concrete touched files, ordered execution, type shapes, proof commands, and a second checkpoint for video.

integration-readiness.notes: Plan keeps execution layers and frontend topology out of scope, validates after the social cluster, and avoids soft aliases or hidden routers.

evidence-quality.notes: Proof contract separates the stale-link metric, validator guard commands, manual registry inspection, and required review artifact.

findings.finding: Initial plan used non-existent rubric names; fixed to implementation-plan, integration-readiness, and evidence-quality before approval handoff.

next_action: Approve the social-content-first hard migration, then move TASK-0148 to building.
